targets.name: Runes up to Ist (Hell)
targets.note: Key runes for Steel, Stealth, Lore, Spirit, Smoke, Treachery

targets.name: Runes for Grief (Lo)
targets.note: Very rare but possible from Hell Countess

strategy: The Barb runs ahead and tanks the Countess while the Zon throws LF at the mob pack guarding her. Countess dies fast to Frenzy. Run this on repeat early to stock up on runes for both characters' runewords.
strategy_affair: Manfred sends his skeleton army in first to absorb tower hits. Zon throws LF at the mob pack, Corpse Explosion chains the rest. Amp Damage on the Countess and she's done. Farm runes for both characters' runewords.

targets.name: Titan's Revenge
targets.note: Best Javazon weapon, drops commonly here

targets.name: Stormshield
targets.note: Best defensive shield in the game

strategy: Quest-bug Andariel on Nightmare for guaranteed better drops. Barb tanks with Frenzy + life leech, Zon uses Charged Strike at melee range. She melts in seconds. Reset and repeat — this is the fastest unique farming in the game.
strategy_affair: Quest-bug Andariel for guaranteed better drops. Skeletons tank while Zon uses Charged Strike at melee range. Cast Lower Resist first — Andariel melts even faster with reduced lightning resistance. Reset and repeat.

location: Act III — Durance of Hate Level 3

targets.name: Arreat's Face
targets.note: BiS Barb helm — +2 skills, res, leech

targets.name: Highlord's Wrath
targets.note: +1 skills, IAS, deadly strike for both

strategy: Moat trick still works — Barb can also just tank him directly with life leech and good res. Zon throws LF at the council on the way in, then both unload on Mephisto. Fastest boss farm for mid-tier uniques.
strategy_affair: Teleport army to Mephisto with Enigma. Lower Resist + Zon's Charged Strike destroys him. Skeletons tank the council on the way in, Zon LFs them, CE chains finish the room. Fastest boss farm for mid-tier uniques.

location: Act I — Wirt's Leg + Tome of Town Portal
strategy: This is Javazon paradise. One Lightning Fury into a cow pack kills the entire herd via chain lightning. The Barb uses BO to buff, then focuses on stragglers and picks up loot. Don't kill the Cow King if you want to re-enter. Hands down the fastest farming zone for this duo.
strategy_affair: The dream team zone. Zon throws one LF into a cow pack, corpses appear, Manfred CE chains the entire screen. Lower Resist makes the lightning even deadlier. Skeletons mop up survivors. Don't kill the Cow King. Absurd clear speed.

targets.name: High runes (up to Zod)
targets.note: Best area for HR farming alongside cows

targets.name: Diablo drops
targets.note: Can drop almost anything in the game

strategy: Clear all three seal boss packs first. Barb tanks De Seis and Infector, Zon clears Vizier's pack with LF. For Diablo himself: Barb face-tanks with max res and life leech, Zon uses Charged Strike. Watch out for Lightning Immunes — the Barb handles those with physical damage.
strategy_affair: Teleport army through seals. Skeletons tank De Seis and Infector while Zon clears Vizier's pack with LF. Amp Damage on Lightning Immunes lets skeletons handle them. CE chains clear density. Lower Resist on Diablo, Zon Charged Strikes — he drops fast.

targets.name: Griffon's Eye
targets.note: BiS Zon helm — only drops from TC87 areas

strategy: Waves 1–4: Zon handles with LF, Barb picks off leftovers and tanks. Wave 5 (Lister): Barb tanks while both use single-target. Baal himself: Barb face-tanks, dodge the frost wave. Best XP zone in the game for leveling to 99.
strategy_affair: Waves 1–4: Zon LFs the waves, first corpse triggers Manfred's CE chain — each wave dies in seconds. Skeletons and revives tank Wave 5 (Lister). Lower Resist on Baal, Zon Charged Strikes while skeletons absorb his attacks. Best XP in the game.

strategy: Easy monster types, no lightning immunes in most spawns. Zon clears at incredible speed while Barb handles any physical-resistant packs. Great early Hell farm since the monsters hit relatively softly. Add MF gear here for maximum returns.
strategy_affair: Easy monsters, rarely lightning immune. Zon clears at blazing speed, Manfred CE chains off every corpse. Lower Resist makes LF even deadlier. Skeletons handle any stragglers. Great early Hell farm — add MF gear for maximum returns.

targets.name: Lem, Pul, Um, Mal, Ist, Gul, Vex, Ohm, Lo, Sur, Ber, Jah
targets.note: Super chests have fixed drop patterns

strategy: Solo-optimized: only works in single-player or low player counts. Pop the super chests in the two fire-hut buildings near the waypoint. No fighting needed — just open chests and reset. The Barb can do this while the Zon does Cow runs in a separate game, or run it together for companionship.
strategy_affair: Solo-optimized chest popping. Teleport to the super chests with Enigma. No fighting needed. Manfred can do this while the Zon runs Cows, or run it together — skeletons make good company.

targets.name: High runes (up to Cham)
targets.note: Council members have boosted rune drops

targets.name: Jewelry
targets.note: Rings, amulets — council drops lots of gold items

strategy: Barb charges in and tanks all three council members. They're fire-heavy so stack fire res. Zon throws LF — chain lightning bounces between the tightly packed group. Fast runs, high rune potential. Watch for Hydras.
strategy_affair: Send skeletons into the council to absorb Hydras. Amp Damage on the group, Zon throws LF — chain lightning bounces between the tightly packed council members. CE chains off the first kill. Stack fire res, watch for Hydras. Fast rune farming.
